Package org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.ldap

Class LdapCacheStore

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.ldap.LdapCacheStore
public class LdapCacheStore extends Object
Holds the caches backing CachingLdapIdentityProviderSession Each lookup type has its own cache, sized independently:
  • userQueriesCache backs name/email/id searches. High-cardinality keys (many distinct filters, multiplied by pagination and ordering), each hit rarely → large maximum weight, shorter TTL.
  • userByGroupCache and groupQueriesCache back "members of a group" / group lookups. Low-cardinality keys hit repeatedly (page renders, authorization checks) → small maximum weight, longer TTL.
Each cached entry expires after it was written (expireAfterWrite), so entries are evicted individually based on their own age. Caches are bounded by a maximum weight rather than a maximum entry count: an entry weighs as many units as the list it holds has elements (with a floor of 1 so empty results still count). This caps memory by the number of cached domain objects, so a single broad query returning thousands of users cannot blow up the heap the way an entry-count bound would allow.

  • Method Details

    • build

      protected static <K, E> com.github.benmanes.caffeine.cache.Cache<K,List<E>> build(long ttlSeconds, long maxWeight)
      Builds a cache bounded by total weight, where an entry weighs max(1, list.size()) units. Weighing by element count caps memory against the number of cached domain objects rather than the number of distinct queries, so one broad result cannot dominate the heap.

    • getUserQueriesCache

      public com.github.benmanes.caffeine.cache.Cache<String,List<User>> getUserQueriesCache()

    • getUserByGroupCache

      public com.github.benmanes.caffeine.cache.Cache<String,List<User>> getUserByGroupCache()

    • getGroupQueriesCache

      public com.github.benmanes.caffeine.cache.Cache<String,List<Group>> getGroupQueriesCache()

    • getStats

      public LdapCacheStats getStats()

    • cached

      public <V> V cached(com.github.benmanes.caffeine.cache.Cache<String,V> cache, String key, String method, Supplier<V> loader)
      Looks up key in cache, recording cache statistics. On a miss the loader (the real LDAP fetch) is run and timed; that duration calibrates the per-hit "time saved" estimate.

    • logStats

      protected void logStats()
      Emits the cache stats summary at INFO every statsLogInterval lookups when enabled. The snapshot is only built on the logging tick, so the common path stays a single atomic increment plus a comparison.
